description: java.com is Oracle’s public Java landing site for end-user Java downloads and general information about Java. Its developer resources point to other domains such as dev.java, oracle.com, and jdk.java.net rather than exposing APIs, MCP servers, GraphQL endpoints, or CLIs on java.com itself.
summary: java.com itself does not expose a documented developer integration surface; it is a marketing/download site that links out to Oracle/Java developer resources on other domains.
